text.title: Proposal From Discovery Template — Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. Use whenever an inbound lead lands.

decision-tree.root-question: Are all preconditions satisfied (recurrence ≥3/yr AND named owner present AND discovery notes available)?

conclusion.verdict: do not apply; use a one-off proposal email or the RFP-fill methodology

branch.question: Are evidence links present for every claim in the discovery notes?
Can the fill be completed within 30 minutes?

conclusion.verdict: execute the 5-step procedure and commit the artefact
split into short variant (≤30 min) and extended variant; ship the short one first
stop; schedule a follow-up call to capture at least one evidence link before drafting

text.example: preconditions=true → evidence_links_count=2 → fill_minutes=22 → run-the-checklist → artefact committed at 2026-05-23.
